name: superscalar
description: Execution-scheduling discipline for parallel sub-agent dispatch. Wraps Superscalar.md v0.4 as a model-invoked skill the agent consults before fan-out decisions: issue_width formula + worktree-isolated reorder buffer + cost-benefit gate + opt-in speculation + adoption thresholds + n=8 dogfood ledger + Entry 06 controlled A/B measurement showing 'parallelism is not sufficient; orchestration discipline produces consistency'.
